bibliographic_info.title: Real-time estimation of multi-frequency phase observable-specific bias for the BDS3 PPP-B2b service

grounding_quotes: <!-- PAGE: 1 -->  GPS Solutions (2025) 29:19 https://doi.org/10.1007/s10291-024-01776-7 ORIGINAL ARTICLE Real‑time estimation of multi‑frequency phase observable‑specific bias for the BDS3 PPP‑B2b service Jun Tao1 · Gaojian Zhang1 · Guo Chen1 · Yihao Jiang1 · Qile Zhao1 Received: 13 June 2024 / Accepted: 1 November 2024 / Published online: 14 November 2024 © The Author(s), under exclusive licence
To address this issue, we present a novel solution by successfully extracting phase observable-specific bias (OSB) products compatible with the PPP-B2b service.
